overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a rocky desert landscape at night toward the illuminated Mandalay Bay hotel in Las Vegas, then transitioning to a roadside path alongside a busy highway with an elevated monorail track. The scene features intense warm golden artificial lighting from the resort against a dark clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert path approaching resort hotel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through rocky terrain toward the brightly lit hotel facade

entered.detail: tall golden-lit modern resort building with vertical illuminated stripes and signage
large gray jagged boulders flanking the path
cluster of dark rocky outcrops with sparse vegetation
green leafy trees and desert shrubs illuminated by ambient light

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow rocky corridor toward the glowing Mandalay Bay hotel, which dominates the center of the frame with intense golden lighting. Large rock formations flank both sides of the dirt path while desert vegetation appears on the right, all under a dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined transition area between hotel and highway

events.description: exits the rocky enclosure into a more open area with scattered trees
turns right to align with the highway direction, moving away from the hotel

agents.ego_description: navigating around the rock formations and turning toward the roadside path

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road with street lighting
elevated steel truss structure running parallel to the highway
tall illuminated tower visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera leaves the rocky corridor behind, revealing a tree-lined area beside the highway. The Mandalay Bay hotel fades into the distance on the left while the elevated monorail track and distant obelisk come into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway roadside with elevated transit infrastructure

events.description: yellow taxi drives past on the highway
red sedan passes by on the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder beneath the monorail structure

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past on the highway
red sedan driving along the road

entered.detail: large rectangular road sign with reflective surface
large boulders lining the edge of the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along the multi-lane highway under the elevated monorail track, with vehicles periodically passing by on the left. Rocky outcrops line the right side of the path while distant city lights and traffic signals are visible ahead in the desert night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded rocky desert corridor toward a bustling urban roadside under a dark night sky. It begins by navigating a narrow dirt path flanked by large rock formations and desert vegetation, moving directly toward the intense golden glow of the Mandalay Bay hotel. As the camera leaves the rocky corridor behind, the scene opens into a tree-lined area where the hotel fades into the distance on the left, revealing an elevated monorail track and a distant obelisk ahead. The movement then shifts to a walk along a multi-lane highway, passing under the monorail structure as vehicles glide by on the left. Finally, the path continues past rocky outcrops on the right, heading toward distant city lights and traffic signals shimmering in the desert night.
